source_pr.title: util: add top sql collector
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

This PR add the collector implementation in #24892 to store Top SQL records persistently.

### What is changed and how it works?

The collector will maintain an in-memory map from sql/plan digest to sql/plan text, and send out to an gRPC endpoint in stream every minute.
In order to protect tidb-server from OOM, there's an upper bound of stored records in the map, which will evict the least total CPU time ones to make room for new records.
The `Collect()` API is supposed to be called every second.

### Related changes

- https://github.com/pingcap/tipb/pull/225/
- https://github.com/pingcap/kvproto/pull/773

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU
    - Consumes more MEM

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
